text: Consider label-based grouping or parent/epic concept for larger backlogs

T-60 (labels in list) is done. Label filtering was already in place. Together these cover most grouping needs for medium-sized backlogs. Parent/epic would require schema change and significant UI work. Revisit only if a real project hits the limit — current gittoc backlog at ~65 tickets still reads fine with filtering.
Part of the relation cluster with T-40 and T-45 — see T-40 note.
